title: Nuttty Light Nostalgic Korean Spaghetti Stir-fry
description: A light and nostalgic take on a Korean dish featuring spaghetti, toast, and pescatarian-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: 1 cup mixed vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, carrots), sliced

instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
Toast sesame seeds in a dry pan over medium heat for about 1 minute or until golden brown, shaking occasionally.
In a large skillet, sauté onion and garlic until translucent.
Add mixed vegetables and flaked smoked salmon; stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Stir in cooked spaghetti, toasted sesame seeds, soy sauce, lime juice, honey, salt, and pepper. Mix well to combine.
Cook for an additional minute or two until everything is heated through and flavors are evenly distributed.
